'''Phosphor bugs''', also known as '''firebugs''', were flying insects that flashed light. They were native to [[Belsavis/Legends|Belsavis]].

{{Creature-stub}}

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1st}}
*[[Children of the Jedi (abridged audiobook)|''Children of the Jedi'' abridged audiobook]]
